outputs.description: The indicator that was tested DBotScore.Type Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: URL reported URL.Malicious.Vendor For malicious URLs, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the reason that the vendor made the decision SlashNext.URL.Value Value of the Indicator of Compromise (IoC)
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: Type of the Indicator of Compromise (IoC) SlashNext.URL.Verdict SlashNext Phishing Incident Response verdict on the IoC
outputs.name: SlashNext.URL.Type

outputs.description: Threat status of the IoC SlashNext.URL.ThreatName Name of the threat posed by the IoC
outputs.name: SlashNext.URL.ThreatStatus

outputs.description: Type of the threat posed by the IoC SlashNext.URL.FirstSeen date
outputs.name: SlashNext.URL.ThreatType

outputs.description: SlashNext.URL.LastSeen date Time when the IoC was last observed
outputs.name: Time when the IoC was first observed

outputs.description: Final IoC value in case original IoC is a redirector to same domain SlashNext.URL.Final.Type Type of the final IoC
outputs.name: SlashNext.URL.Final.Value

outputs.description: SlashNext Phishing Incident Response verdict on the final IoC SlashNext.URL.Landing.Value Landing IoC value in case original IoC is a redirector to different domain
outputs.name: SlashNext.URL.Final.Verdict

outputs.description: Type of the landing IoC SlashNext.URL.Landing.Verdict SlashNext Phishing Incident Response verdict on the landing IoC
outputs.name: SlashNext.URL.Landing.Type

outputs.description: Threat status of the landing IoC SlashNext.URL.Landing.ThreatName Name of the threat posed by the landing IoC
outputs.name: SlashNext.URL.Landing.ThreatStatus

outputs.description: Type of the threat posed by the landing IoC SlashNext.URL.Landing.FirstSeen date
outputs.name: SlashNext.URL.Landing.ThreatType

outputs.description: SlashNext.URL.Landing.LastSeen date Time when the landing IoC was last observed
outputs.name: Time when the landing IoC was first observed
